testcase.name: runScenario["Validate invalid user operations", "Pet Lifecycle API Testing"](5)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Validate invalid user operations # src/test/resources/features/pet.feature:29 === TEST STARTED === 15:22:21 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - CREATE USER RESPONSE: 15:22:21 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - {"code":200,"type":"unknown","message":"101"} When I create a user with invalid email # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.createInvalidUser() 15:22:21 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - Response Body: {"code":200,"type":"unknown","message":"101"} Then the response should indicate invalid user creation # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.validateInvalidUserCreation() 15:22:23 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - GET INVALID USER RESPONSE: 15:22:23 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - {"code":1,"type":"error","message":"User not found"} When I get a non existent user # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.getInvalidUser() Then the user API response status should be 404 # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.validateUserApiResponse(int) 15:22:26 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - LOGIN RESPONSE: 15:22:26 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - {"code":200,"type":"unknown","message":"logged in user session:1776333147482"} When I login with invalid credentials # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.loginInvalid() 15:22:26 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - Login Response: {"code":200,"type":"unknown","message":"logged in user session:1776333147482"} Then login should fail logically # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.validateLoginFail() === TEST FINISHED ===

testcase.name: runScenario["Cross Endpoint Data Consistency", "Pet Lifecycle API Testing"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Cross Endpoint Data Consistency # src/test/resources/features/pet.feature:40 === TEST STARTED === 15:22:28 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - {"id":1776333146423,"category":{"id":1,"name":"HighValue-Bulldog"},"name":"Bulldog","photoUrls":[],"tags":[],"status":"available"} Given I create a pet with category "HighValue-Bulldog" and status "available" # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.createPetWithCategory(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I update this pet status to "sold" # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.updatePetStatus(java.lang.String) And I fetch all sold pets # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.getSoldPets() 15:22:35 INFO stepDefinitions.PetSteps - Pet Found in Sold List: true Then my created pet should be present in sold list # stepDefinitions.PetSteps.validatePetInSoldList() === TEST FINISHED ===
